scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix backend run test:unit && npm --prefix frontend run test:unit
scripts.test:integration: npm --prefix backend run test:integration && npm --prefix frontend run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: npm --prefix backend run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage
